title: The Modern Flour Mill
description: modernflourmills.com zoominfo.com/c/the-modern-flour-mills-and-macaroni-factories-co/425333381 Modern Flour Mills & Macaroni Factories Co. (MFM) is a diversified cereal processor founded in 1949 and headquartered in Amman, Jordan, with a workforce of 201–500 employees. The company operates four main production plants — wheat flour milling, pasta, snack foods, and bakery ingredients — and notably opened the first pasta factory in the entire Middle East in 1967. Its products are sold under well-known regional brands: Al-Ghazal (flour & pasta), Suprema/Barakeh (pasta), MFM (specialty flour & baking mixes), and Samar (snacks), with co-packing and private labeling available for export markets
